Package org.eventb.core

Interface ISCEvent

All Superinterfaces:
IAccuracyElement, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IConvergenceElement, IElementManipulation, IInternalElement, ILabeledElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable, ITraceableElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
SCEvent
public interface ISCEvent extends ITraceableElement, ILabeledElement, IConvergenceElement, IAccuracyElement
Common protocol for events in Event-B statically checked (SC) files.

An SC event has a label that is accessed and manipulated via ILabeledElement.

SC events are similar to events (IEvent) except that they contain statically checked elements:

  • refines clauses (ISCRefinesEvent)
  • local variables (ISCVariable)
  • witnesses (ISCWitness)
  • guards (ISCGuard)
  • actions (ISCAction)

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • ILabeledElement.getLabel()
  • ILabeledElement.setLabel(String, IProgressMonitor)

  • Field Details

    • ELEMENT_TYPE

      static final IInternalElementType<ISCEvent> ELEMENT_TYPE

  • Method Details

    • getSCRefinesClause

      ISCRefinesEvent getSCRefinesClause(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC refines clause with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC refines clause
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC refines clause with the given element name

    • getSCRefinesClauses

      ISCRefinesEvent[] getSCRefinesClauses() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array of all SC refines clauses of this SC event.
      Returns:
      an array of all SC refines clauses
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getAbstractSCEvents

      ISCEvent[] getAbstractSCEvents() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns an array of all SC events refined by this SC event.

      This is a convenience method. It fetches all refines clauses of this events and gets the handles of the abstract events from there.

      Returns:
      an array of all abstract SC events
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database, or one abstract SC event is invalid

    • getSCParameter

      ISCParameter getSCParameter(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC parameter with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC parameter
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC parameter with the given element name

    • getSCParameters

      ISCParameter[] getSCParameters() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array containing all SC parameters of this SC event.
      Returns:
      an array of all SC parameters
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getSCWitness

      ISCWitness getSCWitness(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC witness with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC witness
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC witness with the given element name

    • getSCWitnesses

      ISCWitness[] getSCWitnesses() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array of all SC witnesses of this SC event.
      Returns:
      an array of all SC witnesses
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getSCGuard

      ISCGuard getSCGuard(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC guard with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC guard
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC guard with the given element name

    • getSCGuards

      ISCGuard[] getSCGuards() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array containing all SC guards of this SC event.
      Returns:
      an array of all SC guards
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getSCAction

      ISCAction getSCAction(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC action with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC action
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC action with the given element name

    • getSCActions

      ISCAction[] getSCActions() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array containing all SC actions of this SC event.
      Returns:
      an array of all SC actions
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getTypeEnvironment

      ITypeEnvironmentBuilder getTypeEnvironment(ITypeEnvironment mchTypenv) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the type environment of this event, given the type environment of its parent machine. The returned type environment is made of a copy of the given machine type environment together with all the local variables defined in this event. The given type environment is not modified by this method.

      The returned type environment can be used subsequently to type-check the guards and actions of this event. It might not be appropriate for type-checking the witnesses of this event.

      Parameters:
      mchTypenv - type environment of the parent machine
      Returns:
      the type environment of this event
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database, or computing the type environment
      Since:
      3.0
      See Also:
      • ISCMachineRoot.getTypeEnvironment()
